subheadline: The short version: the core is free forever, and what you pay for is the creators' time and guarantees. Details below.

question_items.question: Is there a free version?
question_items.answer: Yes — and it is not a trial. Community is GPL-2.0-or-later forever: all 244 content elements, 49 Fluid components, and 15 theme presets, on as many sites as you like, full source on GitHub. The paid tiers add the creators' time and guarantees, never features.

question_items.question: What does Pro add?
question_items.answer: Pro is €49/month or €490/year per project and buys certainty: priority email support with a 2-day response, guaranteed TYPO3 LTS compatibility updates, early access to new element drops and preset packs, and minor-version upgrade assistance. It is the tier most teams pick.

question_items.question: Monthly or yearly?
question_items.answer: Your call. Monthly keeps you flexible; yearly gets you 2 months free — Pro is €490 instead of €588, Agency €1,490 instead of €1,788. Founding customers take another 20% off the first year with code DESIDERIO20.

question_items.question: What does installation cost?
question_items.answer: €890, one-time, done by the creators: Composer setup, site configuration, theme preset, and a handover you can build on the same day. Add the half-day editor workshop for €690 — or book both with a Pro year inside the €1,790 Launch bundle and save €280.

question_items.question: Do you host?
question_items.answer: Yes. Managed TYPO3 hosting is €99/month and includes updates, daily backups, monitoring, and an EU datacenter. Hosting Business at €179/month adds a staging environment, a 99.9% SLA, and CDN — your site is run by the people who built the software it runs on.

question_items.question: Can we get custom elements?
question_items.answer: Absolutely — it is what we do best. Custom content element development starts at €390 per element, built by the creators to the same audit rules as the stock 244, backend preview included. For ongoing capacity, Creator Care adds 4 dev hours every month for €490.
